headlines.title: Taylor Farms and Taco Bell removes iceberg lettuce amid parasite outbreak
headlines.description: In a new statement, Taylor Farms says they are voluntarily removing all iceberg lettuce from the U.S. market sourced from one Mexican farm. Taco Bell says they have removed all Taylor Farms lettuce from their restaurants and supply chain nationwide. NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: New FDA-Approved Pill Drastically Lowers Bad Cholesterol
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration on Thursday approved a new cholesterol pill from Merck called Lipfendra, that is said to drastically reduce LDL cholesterol. It was previously only available through injections.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms Lettuce at Taco Bell Linked to Stomach Bug Outbreak
headlines.description: The Food and Drug Administration is investigating a potential connection to iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by produce giant Taylor Farms as the possible source of the cyclosporiasis outbreak that has sickened thousands across 34 states. The fast-food giant is announcing a voluntary recall of some potentially impacted lettuce from its restaurants. NBC’s Anne Thompson reports for TODAY.

headlines.title: Iceberg lettuce eyed in parasite outbreak
headlines.description: The FDA is investigating iceberg lettuce supplied to Taco Bell by Taylor Farms as a potential source for the cyclosporiasis outbreak in five midwestern states. It's a parasite-borne illness triggering severe cramps and diarrhea. NBC News' Anne Thompson reports.

headlines.title: Save up to 76% off during Target’s early back-to-school sale
headlines.description: Target’s early back-to-school sale takes up to 76 percent off backpacks, school supplies, lunch gear and more. Shop the best deals before they’re gone.

headlines.title: Refresh your patio with up to 71% off during Wayfair’s Outdoor Furniture Event
headlines.description: Wayfair’s summer sale takes up to 50% off outdoor furniture, including patio sets, Adirondack chairs, umbrellas and more. Shop the best deals now.

headlines.title: Talking Shop with Lisa Ann Walter of ‘Abbott Elementary’
headlines.description: Actress and comedian Lisa Ann Walter shares everything she keeps in her purse, like the notebook she writes jokes in. Plus, her work with Bic to support educators.

headlines.title: The best deals still available from Lululemon’s Summer Sale
headlines.description: Save up to 50% on Lululemon’s bestselling activewear, including leggings, bags, shorts, t-shirts and more.

headlines.title: Taylor Farms recalls iceberg lettuce amid cyclosporiasis outbreak
headlines.description: Federal health officials have told people to avoid lettuce from Taco Bell restaurants in five states: Kentucky, Indiana, Michigan, Ohio and West Virginia.

headlines.title: Map: Track the spread of measles in the U.S.
headlines.description: NBC News is tracking confirmed measles case counts and state infection tallies. This data will be updated regularly.

headlines.title: FDA approves new kind of cholesterol pill
headlines.description: Merck said on Thursday the Food and Drug Administration has approved Lipfendra, a PCSK9 inhibitor cholesterol pill.

headlines.title: U.S. military will test service members’ testosterone levels, Pete Hegseth says
headlines.description: Hegseth said service members ages 30 and older will undergo screenings to ensure they “have the biological foundation required to sustain the fight.”
